word: G5473 - χαλκίον - chalkíon - khal-kee'-on - Brazen vessel

sections.paragraph:
- Original: χαλκίον

- Transliteration: Chalkion

- Phonetic: khal-kee'-on

- Definition:

1. a (copper or) brazen vessel

- Origin: diminutive from G5475

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Diminutive from G5475; a copper dish: - brazen vessel.
